mapper.sql: id, owner_user_id, post_id, oss_object_id, oss_version_id, oss_reference_id, upload_session_id, file_name, content_type, content_length, media_kind, lifecycle, video_state, public_url, failure_reason, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into post_media_asset( id, owner_user_id, post_id, oss_object_id, oss_version_id, oss_reference_id, upload_session_id, file_name, content_type, content_length, media_kind, lifecycle, video_state, public_url, failure_reason, create_time, update_time ) values( #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ownerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ossObjectId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ossVersionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ossReferenceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{uploadSessionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{fileName}, #{contentType}, #{contentLength}, #{mediaKind}, #{lifecycle}, #{videoState}, #{publicUrl}, #{failureReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select:
select from post_media_asset where id in
#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
select from post_media_asset where post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by create_time asc, id asc
mapper.update: update post_media_asset set lifecycle = 'BOUND', post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, oss_reference_id = #{ossReferenceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, video_state = #{videoState}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
